description_long: This rifle features a long, slender barrel with a dark metallic finish, complemented by a wooden stock and forearm that display a rich brown hue. The receiver and bolt mechanism are clearly visible, with metallic components that contrast against the wood. The trigger guard and trigger are positioned beneath the receiver, and a bolt handle protrudes from the right side, indicating a bolt-action mechanism. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the barrel, with a front post and a rear notch. The overall design is reminiscent of classic military bolt-action rifles, with a robust and utilitarian appearance. The rifle's construction suggests durability and reliability, suitable for use in various urban or rural environments.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a long dark metal barrel, wooden stock, and iron sights, featuring a prominent bolt handle and traditional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel tip and front sight post, with minimal detail of the stock visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, barrel, bolt handle, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the bolt handle slightly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the full profile of the wooden stock and barrel.
